name: @slicenferqin/project-memory-adapter-claude-code
description: Reference Claude Code adapter spike for Project Memory Runtime

scripts.cli: pnpm --filter @slicenferqin/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm run build && node ./dist/cli.js
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @slicenferqin/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
